notes: Game starts with characters being invisible, which can be fixed by adding 'PROTON_USE_WINED3D11=1 %command%' into the set launch options excluding apostrophes.
title: Zenith

notes: It works (you don't even Wine D3D11 but it seems a little less worse -- you don't see invisible shapes like in previous versions of proton), but the frame rate is so extremely bad even at the lowest quality settings it's unplayable. Like, 1 frame in 10 seconds on a GTX 1070. And it does not properly responds to controls. Bug report is at https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/1093
title: Zenith

notes: I sent a previous protondb report saying the game is borked, but I was able to solve the issue by using launch options "TZ= %command%" (TZ, equals sign, then space, then %command%) because my timezone is America/Sao Paulo and there is a wine bug regarding that. After that the game ran smoothly with 90-100 fps and no problems at all.
title: Zenith
